'''Killium Neb''' was one of the 45 [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] stationed on [[Pzob/Legends|Pzob]] to board the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]''. Waiting for the ship that never came, he eventually got tired of waiting, in which he chose to mutiny against the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] and got into a fight. This brutal fight ended with many deaths, including their own.

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1stm}}
